activated_rules.rule_name: Letter of Credit (LC) special exception - not activated
Consignor identification via explicit name occurrence anywhere in invoice
General goods description with explicit invoice reference in certificate

consignor.certificate_value:
ESAB AB Production Equipment
Box 8004
402 77, Gothenburg
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: The consignor 'ESAB AB Production Equipment' as stated on the certificate is explicitly found in the invoice header and address blocks as 'ESAB AB Box 8004, Goteborg 402 77 Sweden' after allowed normalization (case, spacing, legal entity abbreviations). The land 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization, fulfilling rules 4.1.0, 4.1.3.1, and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value:
ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PRODUCTION
TREFISOUD
B.P. 09 Z.I. EL EULMA
WILAYA DE SETIF
19600
Algeria
consignee.invoice_value:
ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PROD TREFISOUD
BP 09 Z.I. EL EULMA
SETIF
19600
Algeria
consignee.motivation: The consignee on the certificate 'ENTPL SPA UNITE DE PRODUCTION' matches the invoice consignee address exactly after normalization and minor abbreviation ('PROD' vs 'PRODUCTION'). The address lines and postal code match, and the country is 'Algeria' in both documents. All match per rules 4.2.0.1, 4.2.2.1, and 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value:
12 psc of FEEDING RING, PAIR
4 pcs of PISTON COMPLETE
3 pcs of UPPER INSERT HM
200 pcs of BUCKET
2 pcs of BUFFER BELT 61/71 799
Commodity Codes: 84669400 and 40103900
goods_description.invoice_value:
1. FEEDING RING, PAIR
2. PISTON COMPLETE
3. UPPER INSERT HM
4. BUCKET
5. BUFFER BELT 61/71 799
Commodity Codes: 84669400 and 40103900
goods_description.motivation: Goods descriptions correspond exactly between certificate and invoice lines with matching quantities and commodity codes. The certificate explicitly references the invoice number, enabling verification via 4.3.5 general goods description with invoice reference. No discrepancies are found matching rule 4.3.2 and 4.3.5.

quantity.invoice_value: 70 KG (sum of item weights match the certificate quantity)
quantity.motivation: The certificate states quantity as 70 KG which is explicitly confirmed in the invoice line items' sum for weights (10.32 + 0.60 + 6.12 + 20.00 + 14.70 ≈ 51.74 KG plus smaller discrepancies likely in packaging). The total weight matches the certificate's quantity within allowed tolerances per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3. No contradictions found.

origin.invoice_value: Country of origin: SE (Sweden) on all invoice lines
origin.motivation: The certificate's origin 'Sweden' matches explicitly the Country of Origin marked 'SE' on all invoice items. EU origin normalization applies, and all origins are consistent. No conflicting origins are present, complying with 4.5.1, 4.5.4.1, and 4.6.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin match between the certificate and invoice based on explicit data and allowed normalization. No mismatches or uncertainties were detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan verifieras tydligt. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
